summary: Package-level singleton keyMap defining all Bubble Tea key bindings for the TUI
state: Package-level var 'keys' — initialized once at startup, read-only thereafter

observations.text: Single global 'keys' var used by app.go, dashboard.go, channels.go, filter_overlay.go, and help.go — all key matching goes through this singleton rather than per-model configuration.

Toggle key binds both 'enter' and 'l' (Vim-style); Confirm key binds both 'y' and 'enter' — these overlap. In the channels delete-confirm flow 'enter' triggers Confirm; in the dashboard 'enter' triggers Toggle. Context is determined by which Update handler receives the message.
